scripts.prepare: npm run prepare:openapi && npm run prepare:helm
scripts.check: npm run prepare && npx -y fern-api@latest check && npm run validate-mdx && npm run check:gated-links
scripts.check:fern: npm run prepare && npx -y fern-api@latest check
scripts.broken-links: npm run prepare && npx -y fern-api@latest docs broken-links
scripts.dev: npm run prepare && npx -y fern-api@latest docs dev
scripts.generate: npm run prepare && npx -y fern-api@latest generate --docs
scripts.preview: npm run prepare && npx -y fern-api@latest generate --docs --preview
